questions.context_sentence: My hands were dirty because I'd been repairing my bike.
questions.cn: 我的手很脏，因为我一直在修理我的自行车。
questions.hint: re(重新) + pair(配对) -> 重新配对零件，就是修理。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: My hands were dirty because I'd been ______ my bike. (提示: 修理)

questions.context_sentence: James is out of breath.
questions.cn: 詹姆斯气喘吁吁（上气不接下气）。
questions.hint: brea(面包) + th(头) -> 闻到面包，深呼吸。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: James is out of ______. (提示: 呼吸/气息)

questions.context_sentence: We'd been playing tennis for about half an hour when it started to rain heavily.
questions.cn: 我们打了大约半小时网球，这时开始下起了大雨。
questions.hint: heavy(重) + ly -> 沉重地或猛烈地。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We'd been playing tennis for about half an hour when it started to rain ______. (提示: 猛烈地/大量地)

questions.context_sentence: The people waiting at the bus stop were getting impatient.
questions.cn: 在公交站等车的人开始变得不耐烦了。
questions.hint: im(不) + patient(耐心的) -> 不耐烦的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The people waiting at the bus stop were getting ______. (提示: 不耐烦的)

questions.context_sentence: Anna woke up in the middle of the night. She was frightened and didn't know where she was. She'd been having a bad dream.
questions.cn: 安娜在半夜醒来。她很害怕，不知道自己在哪里。她刚才做了一个噩梦。
questions.hint: dr + eam(看作team) -> 梦见一队人在打扰我。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: She'd been having a bad ______. (提示: 梦)

questions.context_sentence: Anna woke up in the middle of the night. She was frightened and didn't know where she was.
questions.cn: 安娜在半夜醒来。她很害怕，不知道自己在哪里。

questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: She was ______ and didn't know where she was. (提示: 害怕的)

questions.context_sentence: I was disappointed when I had to cancel my holiday.
questions.cn: 当我不得不取消我的假期时，我感到很失望。
questions.hint: can(能) + cel(牢房) -> 关在牢房只能取消计划。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I was disappointed when I had to ______ my holiday. (提示: 取消)

questions.context_sentence: Soon after the orchestra began playing, something strange happened.
questions.cn: 管弦乐队开始演奏后不久，发生了一些奇怪的事情。
questions.hint: or + ches(象棋) + tra(火车) -> 乐队成员在火车上排练。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Soon after the ______ began playing, something strange happened. (提示: 管弦乐队)

questions.context_sentence: The orchestra had been playing for about ten minutes when a man in the audience suddenly started shouting.
questions.cn: 乐队演奏了大约十分钟时，观众席上的一个男人突然开始大喊大叫。
questions.hint: audi(听) + ence(名词后缀) -> 听音乐会的人，即听众。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The orchestra had been playing for about ten minutes when a man in the ______ suddenly started shouting. (提示: 观众)
